hero.headline: Your business runs. We make it smarter.
hero.subheadline: AI backends, automations, and integrations for Australian businesses that want less manual work and better systems.

tech_gap.title: Your systems work, but they don't work together
tech_gap.body: Your CRM, inbox, spreadsheets, accounting software, SharePoint folders, and project tools all hold useful data. The problem is the gap between them. Staff copy information between tabs, chase missing fields, re-enter customer details, manually process PDFs, and rebuild the same reports every week. That's not a people problem - it's a workflow architecture problem.

rip_replace.title: Enterprise AI is too expensive, too broad, or too hard to maintain
rip_replace.body: Most AI and automation platforms are priced and scoped for large organisations with internal IT teams and six-figure implementation budgets. Small and medium-sized businesses are left with two bad options: overbuy a complex platform or keep doing the work manually. Amphibian Labs exists for the space in between.

trust_gap.title: You don't need another vendor trying to replace everything
trust_gap.body: A lot of consultants start with the product they want to sell. We start with your workflow. Sometimes the best answer is a custom AI backend. Sometimes it's Power Automate. Sometimes it's an off-the-shelf SaaS tool. If a simpler option solves the problem, we'll say so.

services.intro: We turn operational friction into working systems.

discovery.title: Discovery & requirements
discovery.body: Discovery sessions, stakeholder workshops, current-state workflow mapping, and requirements analysis.

advisory.title: Solution design & advisory
advisory.body: Automation and AI readiness assessment, vendor selection, build-versus-buy advice, and implementation roadmaps.

training.title: Workshops & training
training.body: AI adoption and automation literacy workshops for SMBs.

ai_backends.title: AI-powered backends
ai_backends.body: Document intelligence, OCR, NLP, classification, and validation pipelines. Python, FastAPI, containerised microservices.

integration.title: System integration
integration.body: Microsoft 365, SharePoint, Teams, CRMs, EHRs, accounting tools, and third-party API integrations. No migration required.

automation.title: Workflow automation
automation.body: Power Automate, Make, n8n, Azure Logic Apps - eliminate manual steps across platforms.

open_source.title: Open-source projects
open_source.body: Production-grade tools under MIT licence. DocIQ is the flagship AI document intelligence engine.

community.title: Community resources
community.body: Automation templates, reference architectures, technical guides, and practical AI adoption resources for SMBs.

rows.before: Staff spend hours reading PDFs, copying values, and typing data into internal systems
rows.after: An AI backend extracts structured data, validates it, assigns confidence scores, and sends clean output to the right destination

rows.before: Your CRM, accounting software, inbox, and operational tools don't talk to each other
rows.after: A lightweight integration layer moves data between systems automatically - no platform migration needed

rows.before: Weekly reports, follow-ups, and compliance documents depend on manual effort
rows.after: Automations trigger at the right time, pull from the right systems, and produce consistent outputs your team can trust

rows.before: AI sounds useful, but it's unclear where it fits or whether your business is ready
rows.after: You leave a discovery session with a mapped use case, technical recommendation, and a realistic implementation path

process.key_message: The person who maps your requirements is the person who understands the architecture and builds the solution. Less handoff loss. More accountability. Cleaner execution.

steps.title: Listen
steps.body: Clarity session. You explain the workflow, the systems involved, the pain points, and what success would look like. No pitch theatre. No forced commitment.

steps.title: Map
steps.body: We document the current state: systems, data flows, manual steps, edge cases, risks, constraints, budget, and ownership.

steps.title: Recommend
steps.body: We design the right path: off-the-shelf tool, workflow automation, API integration, AI backend, custom portal, or hybrid approach. If the best option doesn't involve us, we'll say so.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: We deliver iteratively. You see working software early, test it against real workflows, and give feedback before the system is final. No six-month black box.

steps.title: Handover
steps.body: Documentation, source code where applicable, deployment notes, BAU handover, and knowledge transfer. You own the system. No vendor lock-in.

articles.title: Why we enhance your systems instead of replacing them
articles.excerpt: Most businesses don't need a full platform migration. They need the systems they already trust to exchange data, automate manual steps, and expose information at the right time.

articles.title: How we built DocIQ: an open-source AI engine for medical document processing
articles.excerpt: A technical deep dive into DocIQ: a Python and FastAPI document intelligence backend for OCR, classification, entity extraction, validation, and FHIR R4-compatible healthcare outputs.

articles.title: 5 signs your business is ready for AI - and 3 signs you're not
articles.excerpt: AI succeeds when there is a clear workflow, digital data, repeatable rules, and a measurable outcome. This guide helps SMBs decide whether AI is the right next move.

about.bio_p1: Amphibian Labs is an Australian technology consultancy that helps small and medium-sized businesses automate repetitive work, connect disconnected systems, and apply AI where it creates measurable operational value.
about.bio_p2: The company was built around a pattern that repeats across industries: businesses have working systems and capable teams, but too much value stays trapped between tools. Manual steps, disconnected platforms, and information that never reaches the right place at the right time.
about.bio_p3: Amphibian Labs takes a different approach. We do not start by replacing your stack. We start by understanding it. Then we add the missing layer: automation, integration, AI extraction, structured data, dashboards, or advisory. The goal is simple: keep what works, improve what slows you down, and leave you with a system you own.
about.philosophy: Amphibian Labs is a lab in the true sense - we create, experiment, publish, and help.

engagement.intro: Flexible options - no lock-in contracts. Start small and scale up when you're ready.

discovery.title: Discovery session
discovery.description: A focused diagnostic session for businesses that want clarity before committing to a build. We listen to the workflow problem, ask technical and operational questions, map the current state, and identify the highest-value opportunities for automation, integration, or AI. Written report delivered within 48 hours with current-state summary, key pain points, recommended next steps, 2–3 practical improvement options, and build-versus-buy guidance. No obligation.
discovery.cta: Book a discovery session - $300 for 2 hours of honest answers and a written report.

discover.label: Discover
discover.title: Understand what you have and what you need
discover.best_for: Businesses that know something isn't working but aren't sure what to fix first.

build.label: Build
build.title: Deliver a scoped technical solution with defined outcomes
bullets: AI backends and document extraction systems

evolve.label: Evolve
evolve.title: Keep improving your systems as the business changes
bullets: Monitoring and improvement of existing workflows
Technical advice for future tools and vendors
evolve.best_for: Businesses that want a technical partner available as new requirements appear.

contact.subtitle: Describe the workflow, system, or manual process causing the most friction. We'll reply with a practical next step: discovery, advisory, automation, integration, or a recommendation to use an existing tool instead.
contact.confirmation: Got it. We'll review your message and reply with the next practical step.
